flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mississippi College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.4k → $23.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mississippi College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.4k → $23.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mississippi College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mississippi College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2k → 2.5k).
